notes: I've designed a Cargo-inspired portfolio template for you. It features a sharp editorial layout with a poster-led grid and a quiet text-based project list. The design system focuses on high-contrast typography (using Newsreader) and a minimal, architectural feel with a lot of whitespace. Let me know if you'd like to adjust the layout or create a specific project case study view.
prompt: Design a Cargo-inspired graphic design portfolio template with a quiet project list, poster-led thumbnails, strong editorial whitespace, and metadata that feels useful instead of decorative.
suggestions: Design a project details page for 'Concrete Vernacular'
Change the color palette to a dark mode version
Add a filter by category (e.g. 'Identity', 'Print') to the project list
title: Portfolio Index
